---
title: "Experimentación en Química Industrial I"
listing:
    contents:
    - eqi1
    type: grid # default,table,grid
    sort: "date" # "title desc"
    categories: true
    feed: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
website:
  #site-url: "https://github.io/anxosanchez/anxoblog"
---
